prompts.title: Trend-Jacking Content Ideas
prompts.use_case: Find viral content angles from current trends
prompts.prompt: Generate 5 government contracting content ideas related to [TREND]. For each: (1) Content angle, (2) Platform best suited, (3) Why it matters to contractors, (4) Engagement hook, (5) How to make it viral.

prompts.title: Seasonal Campaign Ideas
prompts.prompt: Generate 4 campaign ideas for [SEASON/MONTH]. For contractors in [INDUSTRY]. Include: (1) Campaign theme, (2) 5 content pieces, (3) Timeline, (4) Expected reach, (5) Success metrics.

prompts.title: Question-Based Content Ideas
prompts.use_case: Create content around contractor pain points
prompts.prompt: Generate 10 content ideas answering questions government contractors ask. Pain points: [PAIN_POINTS]. For each: (1) Question, (2) Answer in 1 sentence, (3) Content format, (4) Audience size, (5) Evergreen or timely?

prompts.title: Series Content Ideas
prompts.use_case: Create recurring content series for consistency
prompts.prompt: Design 3 recurring content series for [COMPANY]. For each: (1) Series name, (2) Publishing schedule, (3) 5 episode ideas, (4) Format (thread/article/post), (5) Engagement strategy.
